creator: minsoochoo0122@proton.me
text:
We are discussing what should be added, deleted, or updated in FreeBSD Forum. There have been several arguments and it will take a long time to find a person who can edit the handbook and commit. I'm in family vacation now, so I don't have much time for contributing. I will have some free time from February. I'm so sorry about this.

Forum discussion link: https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/please-give-some-ideas-about-the-handbook-describing-freebsd-in-virtual-machine-how-to.78285/
